\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5270 introduces Batch Magnetic Flux Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\nabla^2 \Phi \= 4\pi G\_{eff} \rho, \; \rho \= m\_0 n.$$
